title: Our Love Story
content: A typical high school love story, it started with a crush, sending each other messages on Facebook, trying to get each other's phone number, and now ending up as each other's lifetime partner.

timeline.title: The Beginning
timeline.description: A typical high school love story, it started with a crush and simple moments that slowly brought us closer.

timeline.title: Lessons & Laughter
timeline.description: We sent each other messages on Facebook and found little ways to stay connected every day.

timeline.title: Finding Each Other
timeline.description: From trying to get each other's phone number to becoming each other's lifetime partner, this is our forever.
